title: dorstenia quadrangularis var. integrifolia
intro: Dorstenia quadrangularis var. integrifolia is a plant species within the family Moraceae, commonly known as the quadrangular leaf plant. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Dorstenia quadrangularis var. integrifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat a range of health issues.
